ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication where the review was published */,
  "article" TEXT /* Title or summary of the article containing the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was published */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sentiment of the review */,
  "impact_rating" INTEGER /* Rating indicating the impact of the review on sales */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Full text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the reviewer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the review is written */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the review was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publication */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publication's website */,
  "circulation" INTEGER /* Circulation number of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., magazine, online blog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Loudspeakers) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Specific model number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was released */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Any affiliations the author might have */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the review */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_access_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
